ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., discovery, pass, start, view) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES action_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action performed */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User's browser and device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action associated with the metric */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., discovered, passed, started, viewed) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_metrics_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_metrics_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_action_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "discovered" INTEGER /* Number of times the user discovered the action */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Number of times the user passed the action */,
  "started" INTEGER /* Number of times the user started the action */,
  "viewed" INTEGER /* Number of times the user viewed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_action_summary_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_action_summary_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_action_summary_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., course, quiz, game) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)
